title: [WIP] Improve logging
body:
Progress:
- Add file name and function name to debug log
- Pad text and disable truncation for loglevel to improve readability 

References #4854

Unfortunately, I haven't been able to find time to focus on this.
Maybe these changes could be looked at and merged if necessary, and the remaining work could be continued in the future.

No worries, @weirdwiz!  I am closing the PR for now but feel free to reopen and go back to it later on.
